patch.value: Improve --remove error + help so agents know it accepts path identifiers only and audit context goes via --message; reject note=/scope= with a guiding message.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Added focused unit spec tests/unit/cli/linked-artifacts-remove.spec.ts covering GH-277 parseRemoveEntries note/scope guidance branch (lines ~190-200): rejects note=/scope= with 'path only' + '--message' guidance, case-insensitive (Note/SCOPE), both-keys lists "note"+"scope", PmCliError USAGE exitCode; regressions: bare path, path=, undefined=[], empty=requires-path-value, truly-unknown key still routes to assertNoUnknownCsvKeys (NOT path-only msg). 6 tests, all pass via node scripts/run-tests.mjs.

patch.value: GH-277 fixed: files/docs --remove rejects note=/scope= with guidance toward --message for audit context; help text clarified; 6 new parser tests.
